name: Cranberry Salad (A.k.a. Thanksgiving Pink Stuff)
directions: The day before serving, cook cranberries in water over low heat until soft.
Add sugar and mash.
Add chopped nuts.
Stir, cover and refrigerate overnight.
About 4 hours before serving, add the fruit cocktail.
Just before serving, whip cream, add sugar and vanilla and whip until soft peaks form.
Add bananas to fruit mixture.
Gently fold whipped cream into fruit mixture until well blended.
Serve immediately.
Note: You can use Cool Whip instead of whipping the cream, but the flavor is so much better with the real thing!

name: Cranberry Fruit Basket
directions: Stir boiling water into gelatin in large bowlat least two minutes until completely dissolved.
Stir in cold ginger al.
Refrigerate about 1 1/2 hours or until thickened (spoon drawn through leaves definite impression) Stir in fruit.
Spoon into a 6-cup mold sprayed with no stick cooking spray.
Refrigerate 4 hours or until firm.
Unmold.

name: Cranberry Glaze
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a bowl and mix well together.
Oven roasting, apply during the last 30- 45 minutes.
This will cover one whole roast turkey.

similar.name: Cranberry Orange Relish With Grand Marnier
Apricot Cranberry Sauce - Beats  Canned Cranberry Sauce by Far

name: Cranberry Salad
directions: Grind cranberries in blender.
Then mix all ingredients including orange zest together except water and Jello.
Dissolve Jello in water then combine with other ingredients.
Place into desired serving bowl and chill about 3 hours until set.
This freezes great for later use! thaw in fridge.

name: Pumpkin Pie Quesadillas
directions: Combine pumpkin,sugar,and spice set aside.
Spread cream cheese in a equal amount on each tortilla to within a half inch of edge.
Do the same with the pumpkin mixture.
Heat a skillet on medium heat spray with cooking spray.
Place tortilla filling side up cook 1-2 minutes and quickly fold in half.
Place on a platter,cover and keep warm.
Repeat until all are cooked and folded.
Cut each in half top with cool whip.

name: Fruit Salad
directions: Start out with 2 of each fruit and lots of grapes, adding more to suit your needs.
Add marshmallows to your desire.
Spoon in Miracle Whip--enough to coat slightly.
Let chill well in refrigerator.

name: Lucille B's Raspberry or Cranberry Ring
directions: If using raspberries, drain, reserving syrup.
Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
Stir in ice cream by spoonfuls, stirring until melted.
Stir in thawed lemonade and syrup.
Refrigerate until partially set.
Stir in berries and nuts.
Pour into 6 cups gelatin mold and refrigerate until set.
If using cranberries, proceed as above, but add frozen cranberry relish with lemonade.
Stir in nuts when partially set.

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Apple Pie Filling

name: Cranberry Sauce Salad
directions: Soften cream cheese.
Blend in mayonnaise and sugar.
Add fruit and fold in whipped cream.
Pour into 8X8 inch pan, cover and freeze about 6 hours.
Let stand at room temperature for about 30 minutes before serving, or until it can be cut or scooped.

name: Cranberry-Pear Chutney
directions: In a large saucepan, heat the cranberries, brown sugar, and 2 cups of water over medium-high heat to boiling.
Simmer, stirring occasionally, until the cranberries start to pop and release juices, about 10 minutes.
Add the pears, jalapeño, raisins, and lime juice and simmer for another 5 minutes.
Remove from heat; cool.
Cover and refrigerate up to 2 days ahead.

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Apple Pie Filling

name: Cranberry Relish
directions: Combine ingredients in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the berries pop open (about 10 minutes). Skim the foam off the surface with a metal spoon and discard. Cool to room temperature. Refrigerate, covered, for up to 3 months.

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Apple Pie Filling
Lucille B's Raspberry or Cranberry Ring
Cranberry Orange Relish With Grand Marnier

name: Apricot Cranberry Sauce - Beats  Canned Cranberry Sauce by Far
directions: Boil the water and sugar together for 5 minutes. Add the cranberries and chopped apricots. Simmer until cranberry skins burst, about 6 - 8 minutes. Stir in orange zest and cool.

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Apple Pie Filling
Cranberry Orange Relish With Grand Marnier

name: Cranberry Fluff
directions: Begin preparation of this salad the night before serving.
Chop cranberries.
Add sugar and marshmallows.
Refrigerate overnight.
The next day, add grapes, walnuts, Cool Whip and pineapple.
Store salad in refrigerator.

similar.name: Lucille B's Raspberry or Cranberry Ring

name: Cranberry Chutney
directions: Heat 1 tsp peanut oil in pan, add onion and cook until soft, about 8 minutes.
Add curry, cinnamon and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in sugars and vinegar, bring to boil.
Add magoes or apples and cook, stirring occasionally until softened.
Add cranberries and cook over medium heat for 10 minutes, crushing cranberries against the side of the pan.
Heat rest of peanut oil in small skillet , add the mustard seed and cook until the begin to pop. Add to chutney.
I let it cook on low for 1-2 hours, not sure if that helped, but it sure tasted good!

similar.name: Cranberry Orange Relish With Grand Marnier

name: Tracy's Pineapple, Marshmallow, Cheese Salad
directions: Combine pineapple cheese and marshmallows in bowl. For Sauce: In small pan mix; sugar, flour, pinch of salt. Add egg and mix. Combine vinegar and water and add slowly to egg mixture. Add butter, cook over medium heat until thick. Pour over pineapple, marshmallow and cheese. Chill.

name: Cranberry Holiday Gelatin
directions: 1.	In a large bowl, dissolve the gelatins in boiling water. Drain.
pineapple, reserving juice in a 2-cup measuring cup; add enough cold water to measure 2 cups. Stir into gelatin mixture.
2.	Place the pineapple, cranberry sauce and orange in a food processor; cover and pulse until blended. Stir into gelatin mixture.
3.	Transfer to an 8-cup ring mold coated with cooking spray.
Refrigerate until firm. In this step if you want you can just put it in a nice glass bowl.
4.	In a small bowl, combine whipped topping and sour cream. Unmold gelatin; serve with topping.

similar.name: Lucille B's Raspberry or Cranberry Ring

name: Cranberry Orange Relish With Grand Marnier
directions: Place cranberries and oranges in a food processor.  Pulse until consistency that suits you.
Combine in a saucepan all other ingredients, except Grand Marnier.  Bring to a boil and simmer 30 minutes.
Cool and add Grand Marnier.  Will keep several months refrigerated.

similar.name: Apricot Cranberry Sauce - Beats  Canned Cranberry Sauce by Far

name: Dad's Cranberry Relish
directions: *Very Important* This takes 3 days to marinate flavors and be palatable.
Using a food processor, strong blender or food processor,.
Chop/grind cranberries and oranges (with peel) together in batches to resemble pickle relish (save all juices).
Place all ground fruits and juices into Ziploc type baggie or bowl with fitted lid.
Add sugar into relish and knead bag, or stir, ingredients.
Place in refrigerator.
Knead or stir every time you get into the refrigerator, or at least 3 times a day.
*This will taste very bitter if sampled on days 1 or 2.
This relish keeps well in the refrigerator up to 14 days.
A little serving goes a long way.

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Apple Pie Filling
Lucille B's Raspberry or Cranberry Ring

name: Cranberry Sauce With Apple Pie Filling
directions: In a smallish mixing bowl put the apple pie filling and the cranberry sauce.
Stir until well combined.
Chill in the fridge until serving time.

similar.name: Lucille B's Raspberry or Cranberry Ring
Apricot Cranberry Sauce - Beats  Canned Cranberry Sauce by Far
